name: Chocolate Chip Sensation
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Roll cookie dough into a ball and flatten.
3. Dip the flattened dough in flour and roll out into a 13-inch circle on a 15-inch Baking Stone.
4. Bake the cookie for 12-15 minutes or until browned. Let cool for 10 minutes.
5. Use a serrated bread knife or spatula to loosen the cookie from the stone. Cool completely.
6. In a bowl, combine cream cheese and sugar; set aside.
7. In another bowl, combine half and half and instant pudding with a whisk. Let set until firm, about 5 minutes.
8. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the thoroughly cooled cookie base.
9. Layer the pudding mixture over the cream cheese layer.
10. Chop nuts with a food chopper and sprinkle over the cookie.
11. Chill until served.
12. Cut with a pizza cutter.
